bump_rationale: Closes a 72-release / 9-month gap. Headline wins: ArcRuntime in arcilator (#9358), FST trace (#9979), FIRRTL 6.0.0 (#10435), Synth dialect with circt-synth + functional reduction (#10073/#10277), Comb canonicalizations + LLHD Mem2Reg quadratic fix (#10394/#10461). LLVM substrate bumped from 19.0.0git to 23.0.0git.
